subject: A male humanoid figure in layered tactical/leather gear with goggles, carrying a large gun over one shoulder — generic FFXIV Machinist job class
description: A male figure in layered tactical gear stands in a confident, slightly forward-leaning pose. He wears goggles pushed up on his forehead and a multi-layered outfit combining dark leather, brown cloth, and armored accents with gold trim. A large rifle-style firearm rests over his right shoulder. His left hand is raised with a clenched fist near his face. The palette is warm earth tones — browns, dark greens, gold — with a pale cream background. This is the generic FFXIV Machinist job class look; no named character identity is confirmed.
foreground: Tactical gear-wearing gunner with rifle over shoulder, fist raised
emotion: Confident and ready; forward lean, fist raised, determined expression
